fixed.sql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT material_pn, gap_date, gap_qty
  FROM material_risk
  WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
    AND gap_date IS NOT NULL
),
min_gap AS (
  SELECT min(gap_date) AS earliest_date FROM latest
)
SELECT l.material_pn, l.gap_date, l.gap_qty
FROM latest l, min_gap m
WHERE l.gap_date = m.earliest_date
ORDER BY l.material_pn

fixed.sql:
WITH today AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily
),
forecast AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sum(yhat) AS forecast_units
  FROM forecast_daily, today
  WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
    AND date > today.dt
    AND date <= today.dt + INTERVAL 28 DAY
  GROUP BY sku_id
),
actual AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sum(units_sold) AS actual_units
  FROM sales_daily, today
  WHERE date > today.dt - INTERVAL 28 DAY
    AND date <= today.dt
  GROUP BY sku_id
)
SELECT f.sku_id, p.product_name, f.forecast_units, COALESCE(a.actual_units, 0) AS actual_units
FROM forecast f
LEFT JOIN actual a USING (sku_id)
JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
ORDER BY f.forecast_units DESC
LIMIT 5

rag.sql:
WITH top_skus AS (
    SELECT sku_id, SUM(yhat) AS forecast_28d
    FROM forecast_daily
    WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
    GROUP BY sku_id
    ORDER BY forecast_28d DESC
    LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
    t.sku_id,
    p.product_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(s.units_sold), 0) AS actual_sales_last_28d
FROM top_skus t
JOIN products p ON t.sku_id = p.sku_id
LEFT JOIN sales_daily s
    ON t.sku_id = s.sku_id
    AND s.date > (SELECT MAX(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL '28 DAYS'
GROUP BY t.sku_id, p.product_name, t.forecast_28d
ORDER BY t.forecast_28d DESC

       b.sku_id, p.product_name

JOIN supply_split ss USING (material_pn)
JOIN suppliers su USING (supplier_id)

WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
  AND (SELECT count(*) FROM supply_split s2 WHERE s2.material_pn = r.material_pn) = 1

fixed.sql:
WITH mat_sku_cnt AS (
  SELECT b.material_pn, m.material_name, count(DISTINCT b.sku_id) AS sku_count
  FROM bom b
  JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
  GROUP BY b.material_pn, m.material_name
),
max_cnt AS (
  SELECT material_pn, material_name, sku_count,
         RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sku_count DESC) AS rnk
  FROM mat_sku_cnt
)
SELECT m.material_pn, m.material_name, m.sku_count,
       b.sku_id, p.product_name
FROM max_cnt m
JOIN bom b ON m.material_pn = b.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
WHERE m.rnk = 1
ORDER BY m.material_pn, b.sku_id

rag.sql:
WITH max_shared AS (
    SELECT count(DISTINCT sku_id) AS cnt
    FROM bom
    GROUP BY material_pn
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT b.material_pn, b.sku_id
FROM bom b
JOIN (
    SELECT material_pn
    FROM bom
    GROUP BY material_pn
    HAVING count(DISTINCT sku_id) = (SELECT cnt FROM max_shared)
) top_materials ON b.material_pn = top_materials.material_pn
ORDER BY b.material_pn, b.sku_id

),
actual_28d AS (
  SELECT sum(units_sold) AS actual_sales
  FROM sales_daily, today
  WHERE date > today.dt - INTERVAL 28 DAY
),

  FROM forecast_daily, today
  WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
    AND date > today.dt
)

SELECT p.sku_id, p.product_name, pr.sell_price
FROM products p
JOIN (
  SELECT sku_id, sell_price
  FROM (
    SELECT sku_id, sell_price,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sku_id ORDER BY week_start DESC) AS rn
    FROM prices
  ) t
  WHERE rn = 1
) pr USING (sku_id)
ORDER BY pr.sell_price DESC
LIMIT 5

FROM (
  SELECT sku_id, week_start, sell_price,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sku_id ORDER BY week_start DESC) AS rn
  FROM prices
) p
JOIN products pr ON p.sku_id = pr.sku_id
WHERE p.rn = 1
ORDER BY p.sell_price DESC, p.sku_id
LIMIT 5

SELECT material_pn, gap_date, 
       (gap_date - (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)) AS days_until_shortage
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND risk_level = 'RED'
  AND gap_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY gap_date
